ohtani.title: Marte, Arenado hit huge homers in D-backs' 4-1 win
ohtani.blurb: Ketel Marte and Nolan Arenado hit late-inning homers while Tommy Troy hits the first of his career in the D-backs' 4-1 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Velázquez, Saggese and Herrera power Cardinals to win
imanaga.blurb: Nelson Velázquez, Thomas Saggese and Iván Herrera each homered as the Cardinals' bullpen tossed six innings of one-run ball in a 6-5 win

suzuki.title: Masyn Winn's two-run single leads Cardinals to win
suzuki.blurb: Matthew Liberatore tosses 5 1/3 scoreless innings and Masyn Winn hits a two-run single in the Cardinals' 5-1 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Red Sox score six in the 7th to fuel 9-4 comeback win
yoshida.blurb: Jarren Duran hits a leadoff homer and the Red Sox rally to score six runs in the 7th inning to fuel a 9-4 comeback win over the Guardians

okamoto.title: Colton Cowser homers in the Orioles' 9-5 win
okamoto.blurb: Colton Cowser crushes a three-run homer and Kyle Bradish tosses seven strong innings in the Orioles' 9-5 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: James Wood crushes a homer to fuel Nationals' victory
matsui.blurb: James Wood drills a two-run home run, while Luis García Jr. slugs a solo home run to help lead the Nationals to a 4-2 win over the Padres
